f2p_added: maps groq qwen3 reasoning levels to default reasoning_effort
keeps normal reasoning_effort for groq models without compat mapping
notes: Issue #1745 (OpenAI tool-choice / Groq qwen3 reasoning_effort). Canonical patch adds 2 new behavioral `it()` blocks in packages/ai/test/openai-completions-tool-choice.test.ts: one asserts groq qwen3-32b maps all reasoning levels to 'default', the other asserts groq openai/gpt-oss-20b passes through 'medium' unchanged. Both are pure input/output payload assertions — implementation-agnostic, behavioral. Replaced FAIL_TO_PASS=[] (vitest-pass-rate fallback) with these two targeted gates. _fidelity: exact, no warnings. Patch also updates types.ts (ThinkingLevel-keyed reasoningEffortMap), openai-completions.ts (mapReasoningEffort helper, Groq detection), and custom-provider.md docs.
